message:
✨ Add unified dashboard configs for all 21 dashboards (#438)

Adds config-driven dashboard configurations for all dashboard pages:

New dashboard configs:
- clusters: Multi-cluster overview and management
- compliance: Security posture and compliance metrics
- cost: Cluster cost analysis and optimization
- gpu: GPU resource allocation and utilization
- nodes: Node status, capacity, and management
- deployments: Deployment status and rollout management
- pods: Pod status, logs, and troubleshooting
- services: Service status and configuration
- helm: Helm chart versions, releases, and values
- alerts: Alert management and configuration
- ai-ml: LLM inference, ML jobs, and notebooks
- ci-cd: Continuous integration and deployment pipelines

Each dashboard defines:
- Default card placements with grid positions
- Stats section type
- Feature flags (drag-drop, auto-refresh, etc.)
- Storage key for persistence

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+/**
+ * AI/ML Dashboard Configuration
+ */
+import type { UnifiedDashboardConfig } from '../../lib/unified/types'
+
+export const aiMlDashboardConfig: UnifiedDashboardConfig = {
+  id: 'ai-ml',
+  name: 'AI/ML Workloads',
+  subtitle: 'LLM inference, ML jobs, and notebooks',
+  route: '/ai-ml',
+  statsType: 'ai-ml',
+  cards: [
+    { id: 'llm-models-1', cardType: 'llm_models', position: { w: 6, h: 4 } },
+    { id: 'llm-inference-1', cardType: 'llm_inference', position: { w: 6, h: 4 } },
+    { id: 'llmd-stack-monitor-1', cardType: 'llmd_stack_monitor', position: { w: 6, h: 3 } },
+    { id: 'ml-jobs-1', cardType: 'ml_jobs', position: { w: 6, h: 3 } },
+    { id: 'ml-notebooks-1', cardType: 'ml_notebooks', position: { w: 6, h: 3 } },
+    { id: 'gpu-overview-1', cardType: 'gpu_overview', position: { w: 6, h: 3 } },
+  ],
+  features: {
+    dragDrop: true,
+    addCard: true,
+    autoRefresh: true,
+    autoRefreshInterval: 30000,
+  },
+  storageKey: 'ai-ml-dashboard-cards',
+}
+
+export default aiMlDashboardConfig
